name: Pan Seared Veal Chop with Rosemary
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the veal chops with the garlic, rosemary, 1 tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and pepper.
2. Let the seasoned chops sit on a plate for 15 minutes.
3. Heat a large cast iron skillet over medium-high heat and add the remaining olive oil.
4. Add the chops to the pan and cook until they are golden brown.
5. Flip the chops and remove them from the pan, placing them in a baking dish.
6. Roast the chops in a 375 degree oven for 10 minutes.
7. Return the wine and stock to the cast iron pan and stir up any brown bits from the bottom of the pan.
8. Serve the chops with the juices from the pan.
